summary: Frontend-only testing of BookMyVenue landing page redesign. All features working correctly - hero section, search bar, navigation, all content sections, and proper white background theme applied.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign fully tested. All sections render correctly: Hero (headline, tagline, search bar), Live Platform Snapshot (animated counters), How It Works (3 steps), Explore by City (6 city cards), Platform Advantage (4 cards), For Venues & Event Managers (2 cards with CTAs), Final CTA, and Footer. Navigation buttons work: Login -> /login, Get Expert Help -> /register, City cards -> /venues?city=<cityName>, Search -> /venues with query params, Final CTA -> /venues. White background theme properly applied - dark backgrounds only on Final CTA and Footer sections as intended.

hero_section.headline: PASS - 'India's Smart Venue Booking Platform' displays correctly
hero_section.tagline: PASS - 'We Negotiate. You Celebrate.' displays correctly

search_bar.search_button: PASS - Navigates to /venues with correct query params

explore_by_city.city_cards: PASS - All 6 cities (Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Jaipur, Bangalore, Goa, Udaipur) displayed

for_venues_section.event_manager_card: PASS - 'Join as Event Manager' CTA visible
